unit: CBI aggregate known related offender records
public_finding: Known related offenders were 5968 male and 2067 female out of 8037 aggregate offender records; annual male share among known-sex related offenders ranged 72.3% to 75.2% (mean 74.2%).
confirmatory_use: descriptive context only; not a linked justice-system funnel and not evidence of differential treatment

public_finding: Annual female share among known-sex victim records ranged 72.6% to 76.4% (mean 74.5%).
confirmatory_use: descriptive context only; does not identify reporting selection, caller role, or police-contact selection

public_finding: Domestic-labeled public call rows had arrest-coded disposition rates from 12.30% to 13.41%; civil-labeled rows ranged 0.28% to 1.30%.
confirmatory_use: public label context only; lacks party sex/gender, probable-cause facts, and verified arrest/referral linkage

unit: DA public aggregate filed case-defendant records
public_finding: Across public aggregate filed case-defendant gender rows, known-gender filed defendants were 55875 male and 18709 female; 356 were unknown or missing. Male share among known-gender filed defendants was 74.9%.
confirmatory_use: descriptive filing context only; not DV-specific and not linked to referrals, count retention, dismissal, plea, conviction, or sentence

public_finding: The public aggregate resolution tables report 46363 felony and misdemeanor resolved cases in parsed 2020-2025 disposition rows, including 9881 dismissed and 152 acquitted rows.
confirmatory_use: aggregate disposition context only; no recorded sex, DV flag, original charge count, evidence, or case-level linkage
